name: Dad Hungry!
short_description: You’re stuck on the island of hunger, and you need to find all the food to escape. However, you come to realize that you’re not the only one who’s hungry…
detailed_description:
Dad Hungry is a comedic first-person game taking place on a snowy island where players need to find all five foods while avoiding getting eaten by dad. Players need to survive long enough to collect all the food and escape the deadly island of hunger.

Key Features:

  • Estimated gameplay is around 15-20 minutes
  • Retro-style graphics
  • Made by a solo game developer, featuring her dad
